mapper.select: SELECT S.ID, S.COMP_CD, S.WH_CD, W.CD_NM_KO AS WH_NM, S.ITEM_CD, S.ITEM_NM, S.LOT_NO, TO_CHAR(S.MFG_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS MFG_YMD, TO_CHAR(S.EXP_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EXP_YMD, S.UNIT_CD, S.QTY, TO_CHAR(S.LAST_IN_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LAST_IN_YMD, TO_CHAR(S.LAST_OUT_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LAST_OUT_YMD FROM ST_STOCK S LEFT JOIN CM_CODE W ON W.GRP_CD='WH' AND W.CD=S.WH_CD AND W.DEL_YN='N' WHERE 1=1 AND (S.ITEM_CD LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR S.ITEM_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR S.LOT_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%') AND S.WH_CD=#{whCd} AND S.QTY > 0 ORDER BY S.ITEM_CD, S.WH_CD, S.EXP_YMD NULLS LAST, S.LOT_NO
SELECT ID, COMP_CD, WH_CD, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, LOT_NO, QTY FROM ST_STOCK WHERE COMP_CD=#{compCd} AND WH_CD=#{whCd} AND ITEM_CD=#{itemCd} AND LOT_NO=#{lotNo}

SELECT ID, WH_CD, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, LOT_NO, TO_CHAR(EXP_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EXP_YMD, UNIT_CD, QTY FROM ST_STOCK WHERE ITEM_CD=#{itemCd} AND QTY > 0 AND WH_CD=#{whCd} ORDER BY EXP_YMD NULLS LAST, LOT_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ST_STOCK (COMP_CD, WH_CD, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, LOT_NO, MFG_YMD, EXP_YMD, UNIT_CD, QTY, LAST_IN_YMD, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{whCd}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, NVL(#{lotNo},'*'), TO_DATE(#{mfgYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{expYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{unitCd}, NVL(#{qty},0), TO_DATE(#{lastInYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{compCd}, #{compCd})
mapper.update: UPDATE ST_STOCK SET QTY=#{qty}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP , LAST_IN_YMD=TO_DATE(#{inYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD') , LAST_OUT_YMD=TO_DATE(#{outYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT L.ID, L.TRANS_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS TRANS_TYP_NM, L.WH_CD, W.CD_NM_KO AS WH_NM, L.ITEM_CD, L.ITEM_NM, L.LOT_NO, L.IN_QTY, L.OUT_QTY, L.BAL_QTY, L.UNIT_CD, L.SRC_TYP, L.SRC_NO, TO_CHAR(L.TRANS_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS TRANS_YMD, L.REMARK FROM ST_LEDGER L LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='ST_TRANS_TYP' AND T.CD=L.TRANS_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE W ON W.GRP_CD='WH' AND W.CD=L.WH_CD AND W.DEL_YN='N' WHERE 1=1 AND (L.ITEM_CD LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR L.ITEM_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR L.SRC_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%') AND L.ITEM_CD=#{itemCd} AND L.WH_CD=#{whCd} AND L.TRANS_TYP=#{transTyp} ORDER BY L.ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ST_LEDGER (COMP_CD, TRANS_TYP, WH_CD, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, LOT_NO, IN_QTY, OUT_QTY, BAL_QTY, UNIT_CD, SRC_TYP, SRC_ID, SRC_NO, TRANS_YMD, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{transTyp}, #{whCd}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{lotNo}, NVL(#{inQty},0), NVL(#{outQty},0), NVL(#{balQty},0), #{unitCd}, #{srcTyp}, #{srcId}, #{srcNo}, TO_DATE(#{transYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{remark}, #{regId})
